title: Dirty Plugin Manifest Drift
objective: A disposable user state with a plugin whose OpenClaw manifest and package metadata disagree, including version drift, id drift, an unsupported contract key, and a missing package entrypoint.

setup.title: Write Dirty Plugin Manifest Drift
setup.intent: Install a plugin-inspector-shaped plugin with deliberate manifest/package drift.
commands: ocm env exec {env} -- node {kovaRoot}/support/dirty-plugin-state.mjs prepare dirty-plugin-manifest-drift

setup.title: Verify Dirty Plugin Manifest Drift
setup.intent: Verify OpenClaw handling did not silently rewrite the drift evidence.
commands: ocm env exec {env} -- node {kovaRoot}/support/dirty-plugin-state.mjs verify dirty-plugin-manifest-drift

cleanupGuarantees: disposable env cleanup removes manifest drift fixture files

source.note: plugin manifest and package metadata disagree
